name: Vinyl Vibes DJ Co.
description: Boutique DJ service with a vintage vinyl aesthetic. We spin real records alongside digital tracks, creating a warm, authentic sound that perfectly complements laid-back, bohemian, and rustic weddings. Think sunset cocktails and barefoot dancing.

includes: Sound system for up to 150 guests
Warm Edison bulb string light accent
DJ spinning vinyl and digital for full event
Sound system for up to 150 guests
Warm Edison bulb string light accents
Wireless mic for officiant and speeches
Custom playlist curation with client input
Cocktail hour and dinner background music

service_area.note: Happy to travel farther for the right event — just adds a travel fee.

venue_partnerships.note: Regular DJ at The Cape Cod Inn. Knows the outdoor ceremony setup and reception layout. 10% discount for Cape Cod venue partners.

playlist_consultation.process: Casual phone or video call to talk through musical vibes, must-play and do-not-play songs, and the overall feel of the wedding. We curate a custom playlist that matches your aesthetic. Final playlist review 2 weeks before the event.
playlist_consultation.vinyl_requests: Couples can request specific vinyl records to be spun — we'll source them if we don't have them

deposit_and_cancellation.note: We're a small operation and try to be flexible. If plans change, talk to us.

highlights: vinyl aesthetic was so cool and unique
perfect vibe for our beach wedding
loved the guest book vinyl experience

sweeteners: Free vinyl guest book experience with any package
Complimentary extra hour for weekday or off-season weddings
Custom record label coasters as wedding favors (50 count)
10% discount for Cape Cod venue partners
Free acoustic playlist curation for dinner service
personality: Laid-back, creative, and genuine. Vinyl Vibes is perfect for couples who want something different from the typical wedding DJ. Very flexible on pricing and loves to customize. Strong following among bohemian and rustic wedding crowds on the Cape. Small one-person operation with a personal touch on every event.
